item.simpleemc.tome_of_knowledge.tooltip: §7Burn in a Transmutation Table to learn ALL items with EMC
item.simpleemc.knowledge_sharing_book.bu: §7Burn in a Transmutation Table to transfer knowledge
item.simpleemc.knowledge_sharing_book.su: Successfully copied %s's knowledge (%d items) into the book!
item.simpleemc.philosophers_stone.toolti: §7Right-click blocks to transmute. Reusable catalyst in crafting.
§dYes, it's infinite. No, don't eat it.
item.simpleemc.transmutation_tablet.tool: §7Right-click to open your personal EMC shop anywhere.
§dPocket-sized magic. Side effects may include losing all your valuables.
block.simpleemc.transmutation_table.tool: §7Place down to store and exchange item values.
§dThe ultimate trash can that pays you back.
block.simpleemc.arcane_transmutation_tab: §7Advanced table with double inventory and built-in crafting.
§dBecause walking to a crafting table is so yesterday.
item.simpleemc.attraction_catalyst.toolt: §7Pulls nearby item entities to your location.
§dRight-click to toggle active state. Automatically consumes alchemical fuels from inventory.
§7Voids liquid source blocks or accelerates crop growth.
§dRight-click to switch modes. Automatically consumes alchemical fuels from inventory.
block.simpleemc.alchemical_hourglass.too: §7Accelerates adjacent randomly-ticking blocks and block entities.
§dAutomatically consumes alchemical fuels from nearby players' inventories.
